description: Horizontal announcement card on a solid medium-blue background. In the upper area, centered-left, is white serif headline text reading 'DHS Will Now Restrict Goods from Over 100 PRC-Based Companies from Entering the United States Due to Forced Labor Practices'. To the upper-right is the circular U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal (white line art of the eagle with shield, ringed by the words 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY'). A thin red horizontal rule divides the upper text from the lower portion. The bottom half has large bold white sans-serif capitals reading 'PRESS RELEASE' with a drop shadow.
notable_text: DHS Will Now Restrict Goods from Over 100 PRC-Based Companies from Entering the United States Due to Forced Labor Practices. PRESS RELEASE.
